subject.objective: Prove a public-safe synthetic hosted WorkLoop path.
success_criteria: plan is submitted with synthetic data
archive readback returns the completed plan

summary: Synthetic review evidence is structurally attached to the WorkLoop decision and completion metadata; no external review engine was invoked.

checks.summary: The fixture uses only synthetic IDs, examples, and local test execution.
The server conformance test reads the completed plan through the archive endpoint.
No first-class hosted review-evidence attachment endpoint exists yet; evidence is carried in existing decision and metadata fields.
